---
title: "model_diagnostics_simple"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-28"
---
#plotting the simple diagnostics
#not doing expansive param recovery etc. due to time constraints (just the bare minimum)
# (also param recovery would probably be hampered by the model & data logic differing on the group mean trustworthiness value? -- fixed mean vs adaptive mean. can't really bother to fix that right now, could be an issue technically?)

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse, # Data manipulation and plotting
  dplyr,
  here, # Robust file paths
  ggplot2, #ggplot
  cmdstanr,
  loo,
  bayesplot #Plotting MCMC
)
#paths of the fits
results <- readRDS(here("models/fits/results_paths.rds"))
```

```{r}
#3. CHECKING DIAGNOSTICS (WBA)
# slim saves are plain lists now, so we access fields with $ instead of calling methods
check_diagnostics <- function(fit_slim, label) {
  diag_smry <- fit_slim$diagnostic_summary        # already computed at save time, no method call needed
  min_ebfmi <- suppressWarnings(min(diag_smry$ebfmi, na.rm = TRUE))
  smry <- fit_slim$summary |> filter(!is.na(rhat))
  n_fail <- smry |> filter(rhat > 1.01 | ess_bulk < 400 | ess_tail < 400) |> nrow()
  cat(sprintf("%-25s | Divs: %3d | Min E-BFMI: %.2f | Failures: %d\n",
              label,
              sum(diag_smry$num_divergent),
              min_ebfmi,
              n_fail))
}

cat("\n=== WBA Diagnostics ===\n")
imap(results, function(r, name) {
  wba_slim <- readRDS(r$wba_file) #gotta load one at a time so RAM doesnt explode
  check_diagnostics(wba_slim, paste0("WBA_", name))
  rm(wba_slim)
  gc()
})

#4. LOO COMPARISON PER DATASET (hopefully correct)
loo_results <- imap(results, function(r, dataset_name) {
  wba_slim <- readRDS(r$wba_file)
  sba_slim <- readRDS(r$sba_file)

  comparison <- loo_compare(list(WBA = wba_slim$loo, SBA = sba_slim$loo))

  cat("\n=== LOO Comparison:", dataset_name, "===\n")
  print(comparison)

  rm(wba_slim, sba_slim)
  gc()
  comparison
})
```
